sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n20889" key="braxu/skios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βρᾰχύ-σκῐος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n20889.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with a short shadow</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2133.tlg001:31" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ach.Tat.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Intr.Arat.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">31</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
